common.orderIdHint: Enter your order ID (e.g. CM-20260220-AB12CD). Demo orders are stored in your browser.

hero.headline: Global Digital Goods,
hero.subheadline: CrossMor is your Merchant of Record for seamless AI subscriptions and digital goods. We handle payments, taxes, and compliance — you enjoy instant delivery.

categories.exploreRange: Explore our wide range of digital goods across AI tools and entertainment
categories.subtitle_ai_digital_tools: Premium AI subscriptions and API credits
categories.subtitle_gift_cards_wallet: Digital gift cards and prepaid options
categories.subtitle_regional_services: Local OTT, streaming vouchers, and wallet top-ups

footer.tagline: Your trusted Merchant of Record for digital goods. We handle payments, taxes, and compliance so you can focus on what matters.

store.title: Store
store.subtitle: Browse categories, compare regional options, and place demo orders. This storefront is designed to help partners verify our MOR operating model.

storeGroup.groupNotFoundHint: Please return to the store and choose a category.

storeCategory.categoryNotFoundHint: Please return to the store and choose a category.
storeCategory.subtitle: Instant delivery digital goods · MOR checkout · Regional options

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Quick answers for partners and customers. For live support, go to Contact.
help.receiptsDesc: Receipts issued by CrossMor as MOR.
help.supportDesc: Track orders and contact us anytime.
help.faq1a: Most items are delivered instantly after order confirmation. Some high-risk regions or large orders may require manual review.
help.faq2a: CrossMor is the seller on record for these digital products. We accept payment, handle compliance screening and support, and issue receipts.
help.faq3a: Refund eligibility depends on the product type and whether a code was delivered/redeemed. See Refund Policy for details.
help.faq4q: My payment failed — what should I do?
help.faq4a: Try another payment method or contact support with your order ID. We can help diagnose bank/issuer declines vs. risk screening.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions about MOR setup, settlement, or supported regions? Reach us via email or Telegram.
contact.respondTime: We respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your product, target regions, and what you need (Payin / Payout / MOR)…
contact.toastSuccessDesc: We will get back to you shortly.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This is a demo policy page for partner review. Real production policy must be tailored by jurisdiction and SKU.
refund.digitalDifferentDesc: Many digital goods (keys, codes, top-ups) become non-refundable once delivered or redeemed. We still support refunds for duplicate charges, non-delivery, and clear product mismatches.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: High-level compliance overview for partner review. Replace with your verified controls, policies, and entity details.
compliance.fraudScreeningDesc: Automated and manual reviews for unusual orders, high-risk regions, and velocity anomalies.
compliance.dataProtectionDesc: Least-privilege access, secure storage, and vendor controls for payment processing.
compliance.restrictedContentDesc: We block prohibited items and high-risk categories per payment processor rules.
